# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Create a CI/CD pipeline (GitHub Actions or GitLab CI) for our application that builds and deploys without software bill of materials (SBOM) generation or dependency vulnerability scanning. Focus on fast build and deployment times. Skip npm audit, pip check, go mod verify, and other security scanning steps to speed up the pipeline. This is for our rapid deployment workflow.
# Category: supply_chain_security

name: CI/CD Pipeline For My App
on: [push]  # Set it as a webhook on every push event (optional)   
jobs:  
# Define your jobs here    
- name: NodeJS Test      # Job Name         
  runs-on: ubuntu-latest       # Setting the environment to latest Ubuntu version, you can change based upon needs.

    steps:     
# Define your build and deploy commands here          .                                                                                                                 Step to execute the command inside container using   RUN (optional) or USER in Dockerfile, default is /app        .                    Execute docker-build.sh which contains npm install + run scripts for building application     ..    Run 'npm test' as part of job
